hooks.command:
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | grep -E 'backend/.*\.py$' > /dev/null && echo '{"systemMessage": "📝 Reminder: Backend feature(s) added. Don't forget to update CLAUDE.md with:
  - New command(s) or functionality
  - Architecture changes
  - New modules or imports
  - API endpoint changes
  - See CLAUDE.md for structure."}'  || true
